post_text:
Quick win for today: ask Claude to rewrite your last email.

Copy your draft → paste into Claude → 'rewrite this clearly, under 150 words'

Takes 30 seconds. Saves 10 minutes.

#AIForBusiness #ProductivityHacks

post_text:
I saved a client 3 hours last week on a single task.

She runs a real estate office. Every Monday she'd spend 3 hours writing listing descriptions.

Now she spends 20 minutes reviewing what Claude drafts. That's 2.5 hours back every single week.

#SmallBizAI #TwinCitiesBusiness #AIForBusiness
